news.title: Meesho shares surged 14% driven by high trading volumes.

news.title:
Meesho Ltd grants 3,04,535 ESOPs under ESOP 2024, each converting to 49 shares.
Total 1,49,22,215 shares covered under the plan, with an exercise price of Re. 1 per option.
news.summary:

news.title:
8 of 15 startups listed in 2025 now trade below issue price, impacted by market volatility and reassessed profitability.
Lenskart, Groww, Meesho, Ather Energy outperform marginally; geopolitical tensions and aggressive IPO pricing weigh on investor sentiment.
news.summary:
8 of 15 startups listed in 2025 now trade below issue price, impacted by market volatility and reassessed profitability.
Lenskart, Groww, Meesho, Ather Energy outperform marginally; geopolitical tensions and aggressive IPO pricing weigh on investor sentiment.

news.title:
Meesho slides 10% following a ₹1,500 crore tax order impacting its shares.
Sugar stocks rally amidst business developments, gaining investor focus.
news.summary:
Meesho slides 10% following a ₹1,500 crore tax order impacting its shares.

news.title:
Meesho stock hits 10% lower circuit following Rs 1,500 crore tax notice.
Rupee reaches record low of 92.35/USD; NSE adv/decl ratio at 1:6 indicates decline.
news.summary:
Meesho stock hits 10% lower circuit following Rs 1,500 crore tax notice.

news.title:
Meesho shares fell 10% after a ₹1,500 crore income tax demand.
The drop coincides with the end of the shareholder lock-in period.
news.summary:

news.title: Meesho receives a tax notice of ₹1,500 crore from Income Tax dept.

news.title:
Meesho Ltd faces a tax demand of ₹1499.7 crore for FY23-24, plans legal contest.
A similar demand from last year is under judicial review; no major impact reported.
news.summary:
Meesho Ltd faces a tax demand of ₹1499.7 crore for FY23-24, plans legal contest.
A similar demand from last year is under judicial review; no major impact reported.

news.title:
Meesho shares increased 7% over two sessions.
Monday's trading session will be crucial for Meesho.

news.title:
Aditya Infotech, Ather Energy, and others delivered up to 133% gains post-IPO, showcasing strong returns in 1 year.
Tech, EV, and growth-focused IPOs outperformed, while mega-issues like Tata Capital saw subdued results amid market volatility.
news.summary:
Aditya Infotech, Ather Energy, and others delivered up to 133% gains post-IPO, showcasing strong returns in 1 year.

news.title:
Meesho Ltd transitioned from unlisted to listed status, debuting on NSE and BSE on Dec 10, 2025.
Corporate Identification Number updated; registered office and incorporation details remain unchanged.
news.summary:

news.title:

Meetings will discuss publicly available info; no unpublished price-sensitive data shared.

news.title:
Meesho Limited's trading volume at 9:24 AM is 0.93x 2-week avg.
41 lakh shares worth Rs. 63 crore traded; CMP Rs. 150.1, up 4.5.

Focus remains on long-term FCF over short-term profit in recent report.

news.title:
Meesho focuses on logistics improvements and operating leverage to enhance margins.
The strategy follows a widened Q3 loss for the company.

Meesho focuses on logistics improvements and operating leverage to enhance margins.

news.title:
Meesho reported a Q3 net loss of 4.9B INR, up from 374M INR YoY.
Revenue grew to 35.2B INR in Q3 from 26.8B INR YoY, showing growth.
news.summary:
Meesho reported a Q3 net loss of 4.9B INR, up from 374M INR YoY.
Revenue grew to 35.2B INR in Q3 from 26.8B INR YoY, showing growth.

The information is available on its investor website to inform stakeholders about metrics.

news.title:

Contribution margin at 2.3%, slight QoQ decline; FCF positive at Rs 56 Cr.

news.title:
Meesho Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.
The board reconstituted the Nomination and Remuneration Committee, appointing Rohit Bhagat as Chairperson.
news.summary:
Meesho Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ended Dec 31, 2025.

The wholly owned subsidiary aims to enhance transportation service capabilities.
